summary: Tested Order Chats integration into Personal Cabinet. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI elements verified (tabs, search, filters, order selection, chat panel). MySQL latency causes slow loading in Playwright but functionality works.

integration_issues.issue: Orders take 10-20 seconds to load from remote MySQL, causing intermittent Playwright test timing issues. Not a bug - network latency.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ New 'Замовлення' (orders) tab added at position 4 in tabs array (PersonalCabinet.jsx:1049)
✅ OrderChatsTab component implemented with search, filters, order list, and chat panel (lines 748-976)
✅ GET /api/cabinet/order-chats endpoint with mode=active|with_notes|all and search parameter (cabinet.py:283-345)
✅ Manager Dashboard '💬 Чат' button navigates to /cabinet?tab=orders (ManagerDashboard.jsx:427-428)
✅ URL parameter ?tab=orders activates correct tab via useSearchParams (PersonalCabinet.jsx:1007)
✅ All existing cabinet tabs (Profile, Tasks, Chat, Team) work correctly
✅ Chat input and send button functional with proper data-testid attributes
✅ Filter buttons work: Активні (active), З нотатками (with_notes), Всі (all)
✅ Search functionality filters orders by order_number or customer_name

backend_apis.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns access_token and user data
backend_apis.POST /api/orders/7400/internal-notes: PASS - Creates note with user from token

frontend_ui.orders_tab_visible: PASS - 'Замовлення' tab visible with Package icon
frontend_ui.filter_buttons: PASS - Активні, З нотатками, Всі buttons present
frontend_ui.order_list: PASS - 54 orders rendered with order_number, status, notes_count
frontend_ui.order_selection: PASS - Clicking order shows chat panel
frontend_ui.existing_tabs_work: PASS - Profile, Tasks, Chat, Team tabs functional

seed_data_creation: Created test note on OC-7400 via API: 'TEST_pytest_order_chats: Test message for verification'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order Chats feature fully implemented and tested. Backend pytest: 15/15 PASS. Frontend Playwright verified: tabs, search, filters, order selection, chat all working. MySQL latency (10-20s) affects Playwright wait times but functionality is correct. OC-7400 has test notes from this verification. The '💬 Чат' button on ManagerDashboard correctly redirects to /cabinet?tab=orders.
